from notebookutils import mssparkutils

cases_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"
archive_folder = f"{mpesc_base_path}/config/Cases/archive"

batch_name = "batch1_cases.csv"   # change this each time
archive_path = f"{archive_folder}/{batch_name}"

mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(archive_folder)
mssparkutils.fs.mv(cases_path, archive_path, True)

print("Archived to:", archive_path)
